Notice Of Motion Contesting The Good Faith Of The Settlement Between Mattingly-Thaler Architure And Mitchell Kapor And Freada Klein
Off Calendar Jan-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SMITH & FONG COMPANY'S MOTION CONTESTING THE GOOD FAITH OF THE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN MATTINGLY-THALER ARCHITECTURE AND MITCHELL KAPOR AND FREADA KLEIN.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE DECISION IN GOVIS ENGINEERING V SUPERIOR COURT (1995) 37 CAL. APP. 4TH 642, 651 DEMONSTRATES THAT THE PARTIES' ALLOCATION IS NOT RES JUDICATA IN A SUBSEQUENT ACTION BETWEEN THE MANUFACTURER AND OWNER. FURTHER, THE EVIDENCE REFLECTS THAT THE HARDWOOD SUPPLIED FELL FAR BELOW THE SPECIFIED HARDNESS. AS A CONSEQUENCE, IT WAS NOT THE ARCHITECT'S SPECIFICATIONS THAT ARE AT FAULT, BUT THE PRODUCT THAT WAS MANUFACTURED. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Denying Arbitration And Order Of Intervention Or Joinder Of All Parties And Issues Re Bamboo Flooring In The Pending Litigation
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FIRST, LAST & ALWAYS, INC.'S Motion For An Order Denying Arbitration And Order Of Intervention Or Joinder Of All Parties And Issues Regarding Bamboo Flooring In The Pending Litigation.

APPEARANCES: RYAN K. J. MAU, ESQUIRE (FOTOUHI, EPPS, HILLGER, GILROY LLP, 415.362.9300) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TAMIKO A. DUNHAM, ESQUIRE (BOORNAZIAN, JENSEN & GARTHE, 510.834.4350) APPEARING FOR RYAN ASSOCIATES.
JENNIFER MARONE, ESQUIRE (RAGGHIANTI FREITAS LLP, 415.453.9433) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS MITCHELL KAPOR AND FREADA KLEIN.
MOLLY C. MACHOLD, ESQUIRE (GORDON & REES LLP, 415.986.5900) APPEARING FOR THIRD PARTY MATTINGLY THALER ARCHITECTURE.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS THE JOINDER OF ALL PARTIES INTO THIS ACTION FOR PURPOSE OF RESOLVING THE ISSUE AS TO THE BAMBOO FLOORING ONLY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (
